contract_note_for_orchestrator: PROMPTS tasks 10-11 (auth/RLS) add 401 responses to /api/rank, /api/heatmap, /api/submissions/:id. API.md itself is untouched, but this is a behavioral addendum to frozen endpoints — the frontend prompt's matching auth tasks (login page, middleware, 401→login redirect) cover it. Consider tagging contract-v1.2. Also: /api/ingest, /api/deadletters, /api/wards remain open per the task spec (deadletters admin page should be gated in UI/middleware or a follow-up).
environment_note: No GCP infra or GEMINI_API_KEY available in this environment (SPRINT E4/I-1..6 open). All code built and verified end-to-end against local Dockerized Postgres 16 + pgvector; Gemini-dependent criteria verified structurally (loud-failure paths exercised against the real Gemini endpoint, which returned API_KEY_INVALID — network path confirmed working). Anything marked blocked needs only env/infra + assets, not code.

tasks.task: 10. Auth.js v5 (Google provider) + API route protection + zod sanitization
criteria_met: auth.ts (Google provider only, GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID/SECRET env, exports auth/signIn/signOut) + app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts
/api/rank, /api/heatmap, /api/submissions/:id → 401 without session; forged token → 401; valid session → 200
zod on all query params (rank/heatmap enums, submission uuid) and ingest multipart body; rank.sql fully parameterized ($1/$2)
test gates authenticate by minting a real Auth.js session JWT with the shared AUTH_SECRET (scripts/lib/session.ts) — no bypass in app code
tasks.evidence: logs/verify-local-1783445254884.log (46/46 incl. 5 auth checks) + logs/citizen-stamp-1783446480.log (citizen session stamps user_id; citizen can poll own submission). Live Google OAuth flow untested — needs GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID/SECRET + AUTH_SECRET provisioned (human).

criteria_met: db/rls_policies.sql: RLS enabled on submissions+clusters, citizen_access + admin_access policies exactly per spec, plus user_id column and cluster read policies (deny-all otherwise)

DAL rlsQuery() in apps/web/lib/db.ts: BEGIN → set_config(app.current_user_id) → set_config(app.current_user_role) → query → COMMIT, transaction-local so identity never leaks across pooled connections; protected routes use it exclusively
DB-level enforcement proven with non-owner role: citizen sees only own row, cross-tenant read = 0 rows, admin sees all, anonymous sees nothing
tasks.evidence: logs/rls-enforcement-1783444843.log + logs/verify-local-1783445254884.log. CAVEAT: RLS binds only non-owner DB roles — production web app must use the jannaadi_web role (commented template at the end of db/rls_policies.sql); worker keeps the owner connection by design. Apply db/rls_policies.sql right after db/seed.sql.

unblock_checklist_for_human: Auth secrets: openssl rand -base64 32 → AUTH_SECRET; create Google OAuth client (redirect URI <cloud-run-url>/api/auth/callback/google) → GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID/SECRET; set ADMIN_EMAILS (comma-separated MP-staff Gmail addresses) — deploy.sh already wires all of these from Secret Manager

Apply db/rls_policies.sql after db/seed.sql; for real RLS enforcement create the jannaadi_web role (template commented in that file) and point the web service's DATABASE_URL at it (worker keeps owner URL)
Test gates (golden.sh, demo-reset.sh, verify-local.ts) need AUTH_SECRET in their environment — same value as the server
Set GEMINI_API_KEY (I-6) → immediately unblocks B1 dry-run, B3, B6-organic, B14; rerun BASE_URL=<demo server> ./scripts/golden.sh for text items G01/G02/G06/G07/G10/G11/G13/G14
Record assets/golden/*.webm + g05.jpg/g09.jpg (H-1, see assets/golden/README.md) → unblocks B1/B4/B7/B11 fully
Provision Cloud SQL + apply db/seed.sql, Pub/Sub topic+sub, GCS bucket (I-1..5)
Run data/generate.ts → psql inserts → REPLAY=true npx tsx worker/ingest.ts → verify B2 → ./scripts/snapshot.sh → unblocks B13
Create Discovery Engine datastore, set PLAN_DATASTORE_ID (T3) → replay auto-runs planmatch → B15
GCP_PROJECT=... GCS_BUCKET=... ./infra/deploy.sh → Cloud Run + /healthz smoke (B12 on live URL)
